new_draft_h2s: Четыре основания: когда суд переходит с долей на фиксированную выплату
Как рассчитывается размер: прожиточный минимум ребёнка и принцип сохранения прежнего уровня жизни
Мировой судья или нотариус: два маршрута

structure_analysis.assessment: Zero overlap. Structure is completely different: new draft focuses on grounds → calculation → routes → evidence → enforcement, while existing focuses on enforcement stage procedures.

thesis_similarity_analysis.assessment: Low semantic similarity. Key topics are distinct:
thesis_similarity_analysis.new_draft_thesis: How to obtain fixed-amount alimony: conditions, calculation methods, court/notary procedures, evidence requirements, and enforcement mechanisms
thesis_similarity_analysis.existing_vzyskanie_thesis: How to enforce alimony through bailiffs: documents, non-payment reasons, bailiff powers, complaint procedures
thesis_similarity_analysis.existing_bankrotstvo_thesis: Alimony debt in bankruptcy: whether discharged, debt types, bankruptcy impact

cta_analysis.new_draft_cta: Оставить заявку на взыскание алиментов в твёрдой денежной сумме
cta_analysis.existing_vzyskanie_cta: Vary - focused on enforcement and bailiff procedures
cta_analysis.note: New draft CTA about establishing fixed-amount alimony (prospective), existing about enforcement (post-judgment)

detailed_assessment: The draft 'alimenty-v-tverdoj-summe' is antithetical to existing alimony articles in terms of angle and target stage. It uniquely addresses the establishment phase (court decision on fixed-amount) while existing articles cover enforcement (bailiffs) and bankruptcy discharge. The structure, thesis, and CTA are all distinct. No rewrite needed.
